name: Handle-exception-Error
description: Fix fetch_user to handle all exception cases. Never crash on bad input or DB errors.
expected: Fixed exception with explanation of root cause
context:
def fetch_user(user_id):
    """Fetch user from database - crashes on connection error"""
    import sqlite3
    conn = sqlite3.connect("app.db")  # Fails if db doesn't exist
    cursor = conn.cursor()
    cursor.execute("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=?", (user_id,))
    return cursor.fetchone()

# The bug: no try/except. Fix it.
# Requirements:
# - Handle sqlite3.OperationalError (locked db)
# - Handle sqlite3.ProgrammingError (bad query)
# - Handle TypeError (bad user_id)
# - Return None on failure, log the error
